allow: Bash(cd "D:/Online Ecommerce Store" && pnpm run typecheck 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:/Online Ecommerce Store" && pnpm run db:generate 2>&1)
Bash(cd "D:/Online Ecommerce Store" && pnpm run db:migrate 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:/Online Ecommerce Store" && pnpm run db:seed 2>&1)
Bash(cd "D:/Online Ecommerce Store" && pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add sheet select slider tabs scroll-area tooltip --yes 2>&1)
Bash(cd "D:/Online Ecommerce Store" && pnpm run dev 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:/Online Ecommerce Store" && npx eslint src/components/ui/scroll-area.tsx src/components/ui/select.tsx src/components/ui/sheet.tsx src/components/ui/tabs.tsx src/components/ui/tooltip.tsx --fix 2>&1)
